creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #159)

Unfortunately, I only have one system running FreeBSD at present. To do as you ask would require me to take that system offline, and I cannot afford to do it at this time. I am planning on getting another system up and running in the next quarter, so hopefully, I could try your suggestion then. This bug has gone 'unsquashed' for nearly two years now. Believe me when I say I really do want to find a way to fix it permanently. Honestly, I cannot figure out why it apparently only affects FreeBSD systems and not Linux, etcetera.
